diagrams.title: IPv4 Header Structure
diagrams.description: Complete IPv4 packet header showing all 20+ bytes with field names and bit positions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding packet format for troubleshooting and network design

diagrams.title: OSI Model with Network Layer Highlighted
diagrams.description: 7-layer OSI model showing how Network Layer interacts with other layers
diagrams.purpose: Contextualizing network layer functions within OSI model

diagrams.title: Subnetting Calculation Box
diagrams.description: 8x8 grid showing 256 addresses with /24, /25, /26 boundaries visualized
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing subnet boundaries and address allocation

diagrams.title: Packet Fragmentation Process
diagrams.description: Large packet being fragmented at router with MTU smaller than packet
diagrams.purpose: Understanding when and how packets are divided in transit

diagrams.title: NAT Operation Diagram
diagrams.description: Private network connected to internet through NAT router showing address translation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how private networks access internet

visuals.title: Network Layer Services
visuals.description: Visual diagram for network layer services
